defmodule MyApp.FeatureFlags do
  def lookup(name) when is_binary(name) do
    flags()[String.to_atom(name)]
  end

  defp flags, do: %{billing: true, search: false}
end

defmodule MyApp.FeatureFlags do
  def lookup(name) when is_binary(name) do
    case fetch_atom(name) do
      {:ok, key} -> flags()[key]
      :error -> nil
    end
  end

  defp fetch_atom(name) do
    {:ok, String.to_existing_atom(name)}
  rescue
    ArgumentError -> :error
  end

  defp flags, do: %{billing: true, search: false}
end
